summary: Census block racial composition data for Bay Area showing population in single-race, two-race, three-race, and four-race combinations.
ACS 2018-2022 age and sex distribution data for the AB617 East Oakland community, with 5-year age group counts.
ACS 2018-2022 rent burden data for AB617 East Oakland community, showing cost-burdened and severely cost-burdened households.
ACS 2018-2022 poverty level data for AB617 East Oakland community, showing population at various income-to-poverty ratios.
Bay Area Vital Signs census tract commute mode choice data with driving, transit, biking, walking, and carpooling shares by year.
ACS 2018-2022 educational attainment data for AB617 East Oakland community, with bachelor's degree, high school graduate, and associate degree rates.
Bay Area Vital Signs city-level unemployment rate data from 2004 to 2023 by jurisdiction.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional economic output (GRP) data by year with population, per capita GRP, and inflation-adjusted values.
Bay Area Vital Signs ZIP code-level home value data from 2001 to 2023 with typical home values by year.
Bay Area Vital Signs subregion-level jobs by wage category from 2001 forward, tracking job share changes over time.
ACS 2018-2022 housing stock age data for AB617 East Oakland community, covering structure type and percent multi-unit buildings.
Bay Area Vital Signs city-level commute time data by employment with mode share for driving, transit, biking, and walking.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional bay restoration data tracking annual and cumulative wetland acreage change since 1969.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional jobs by wage category data from 2001 forward with job counts and share by wage level.
Bay Area Vital Signs city-level poverty data tracking population below 100% and 200% of poverty level by jurisdiction and year.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional poverty data tracking population below poverty thresholds over time.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level economic output (GRP) data with per capita GRP, county share, and inflation-adjusted values.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level poverty data tracking population below 100% and 200% of poverty level by county and year.
Census block racial composition and vacancy data for Bay Area showing Hispanic/Latino and non-Hispanic populations by race.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level unemployment data by year with unemployment rate, count, and labor force size.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional commute time data by mode with average commute and distribution across time buckets.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level commute mode share data by mode and year.
Census block non-Hispanic two-race population data for Bay Area showing combinations of Asian, American Indian, Black, and other races.
Census block racial composition data for Bay Area with three-race non-Hispanic combinations and Asian/Pacific Islander two-race groups.
Bay Area Vital Signs regional unemployment data by year with unemployment rate, count, and labor force.
Census block multi-race population data for Bay Area showing 18+ three-race combinations including Black, White, and American Indian groups.
Census block racial composition data for Bay Area with county names, population by race, and multi-race combinations.
